resources.string:
"AVX and AVX2 implemented, along with BMI1, BMI2, ADX, FMA, F16C and RDANDR extension!

0 : Disable AVX extension
1 : enable AVX, BMI1, F16C and VAES extension.
2 : All 1 plus enable AVX2, BMI2, FMA, ADX,VPCLMULQDQ and RDRAND.
"

Generate aligned atomics only (only available on Arm64 for now).

0 : Generate unaligned atomics handling code.
1 : Generate aligned atomics only, which is faster and smaller code size, but will cause SIGBUS for LOCK prefixed opcodes operating on aligned data addresses.

"Dynarec building BigBlock

0 : Don't try to build block as big as possible
1 : Build Dynarec block as big as possible
2 : Build Dynarec block bigger (continue when block overlaps, but only for blocks in elf memory)
3 : Build Dynarec block bigger (continue when block overlaps, for all types of memory)"

Enable or disable the use of deferred flags.

0 : Disable the use of deferred flags.
1 : Enable the use of deferred flags.

Allow continue running a block that is unprotected and potentially dirty.

0 : Do not allow continue running a block that is unprotected and potentially dirty.
1 : Allow continue to run a dynablock that write data in the same page as code. It can gets faster in loading time of some game but can also get unexpected crashes.
2 : Will also, when it detect an HotPage, flag that page as NEVERCLEAN, and so it will not be write protected but Block build from that page will always be tested. It can be faster that way (but some SMC case might not be trapped).
Defines the max allowed forward value when building Block

Enable or disable the use of native flags.

0 : Do not use native flags.
1 : Use native flags when possible.

Enable x86 PAUSE emulation, may help the performance of spinlocks.

0 : Ignore x86 PAUSE instruction.
1 : Use YIELD to emulate x86 PAUSE instruction.
2 : Use WFI to emulate x86 PAUSE instruction.
3 : Use SEVL+WFE to emulate x86 PAUSE instruction.

Handling of flags on CALL/RET opcodes

0 : Treats CALL/RET as if it never needed flags (faster, unstable)
1 : Most RET will need flags, most CALLS will not
2 : All CALL/RET will need flags (slower)

"Simulation of Strong Memory model

0 : Don't try anything special
1 : Enable some Memory Barrier when writing to memory (on some MOV opcode)
2 : All 1 plus a Memory Barrier on every write to memory using MOV
3 : All 2 plus Memory Barrier when reading from memory and on some SSE/SSE2 opcodes"
Defines whether or not Dynarec will wait for the FillBlock to be ready

Tweak memory barriers to reduce performance impact of strong memory emulation

0 : Use regular safe barriers
1 : Use weak barriers for mild performance boost
2 : Use weak barriers, additionally disable last write barriers
Use of Float/Double for x87 emulation
Maximum number of CPUs presented to programs by Box64
Force every memory allocation in 32bit address spaces
Detect UnityPlayer.dll and apply strongmem settings
"The content you're trying to install already exists."
The content files have the .wcp extension and are compressed using either xz or zst formats.
Do you want to add a new profile?
Do you want to download the selected profiles?
Do you want to duplicate this container?
Do you want to duplicate this group?
Do you want to duplicate this preset?
Do you want to duplicate this process?
Do you want to duplicate this profile?
Do you want to end this process?
Do you want to install additional content?
Do you want to reconfigure this container on the next startup? This will remove the timestamp to trigger Wine Configuration.
"Do you want to reinstall imagefs? This operation will restore system files, your containers won't be changed."
Do you want to remove this container?
Do you want to remove this content?
Do you want to remove this controller?
Do you want to remove this group?
Do you want to remove this preset?
Do you want to remove this process?
Do you want to remove this profile?
Do you want to remove this shortcut?
Do you want to remove this soundfont?
Do you want to remove this variable?
Do you want to remove this wine version?
Do you want to restore default profile?

WineD3D is a translation layer for DirectX 1-11 to OpenGL.

DXVK is a translation layer for Direct3D 9-11 to Vulkan.

VKD3D is a translation layer for Direct3D 12 API to Vulkan.

CNC DDraw is an implementation of DirectDraw for better compatibility with classic games.
Enable DInput for Games in Wine
Enable dumping of Vulkan api calls to file.
Some games may support both APIs. Enabling both XInput and DInput simultaneously in such games may cause control issues, as seen in titles like The Binding of Isaac and the Resident Evil series.
Enable XInput for Games in Wine

Here you can set value of extra-keys variable like in Termux app (read this") and more E.g. "META for META key", "KEYBOARD for soft keyboard toggling key", "PREFERENCES for preferences opening key", "MOUSE_HELPER for mouse helper toggling key", "STYLUS_HELPER for stylus click override overlay toggling key", "EXIT for application exit key.
Disables FEXCore JIT L2 cache lookup, saving memory but introducing stutters.
Switches FEXCore JIT L1 cache to be dynamically sized, saving memory but introducing stutters.
Uses half-barrier atomics for unaligned loads/stores under TSO.
Hides CPUID hypervisor bit (useful for apps that crash with it).
Makes REP MOVS / REP STOS atomic under TSO.
Special SMC + JIT block hacks for Mono detection.
Enables multiblock code compilation. Can cause longer JIT compilation and stutter.
Enables TSO IR ops (required for multithreaded apps).
Makes vector load/stores atomic when TSO is enabled.
Uses volatile metadata from PE files for TSO when available.
Emulates X87 floating point using 64-bit precision. This reduces emulation accuracy and may result in rendering bugs.
Path and Save Name are required
You can access https://github.com/longjunyu2/winlator/releases to get more contents.

If your game utilizes the DInput API for game controller support, please enable this option.

This option will affect both virtual (provided by Input Controls) and physical game controllers.
Certain games like Rayman Origins and Need for Speed: Most Wanted 2005 when using DInput require this to be disabled.

"File Provider allows access to Winlator's internal data through android file manager.

"

If your game utilizes the XInput API for game controller support, please enable this option.

This option will affect both virtual (provided by Input Controls) and physical game controllers.
You will now be prompted to pick a driver. These must be the same ones used in other emulators like Yuzu, Dolphin, Citra, etc.
Be warned that because of limitations of current PC emulators, Qualcomm Drivers may not work on chipsets below 8 Gen2 without getting patched.
Not a valid save directory path
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Warning: Installing a new version of Wine is recommended for testing purposes only.
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year
Register a save file directory from one of your containers to get started!
The path has not been changed. Do you want to continue?

Contents contain executable files. Unsafe executable files may compromise your data or device security. Before installing, PLEASE make sure that the additional content you are installing is trustworthy.
Show app in picture-in-picture mode when home button or recents button is pressed
Reseed screen while soft keyboard is open
The screen size will be adjusted while Soft Keyboard is open.
Adjust display height for extra keys bar
May cause screen flickering during toggling EK bar.
Adjust the set resolution to fit screen orientation
Samsung Dex only. Allows interception of Alt+F4, Meta+D, Meta+E, etc.
Enable Accessibility service for intercepting system shortcuts manually.
Enable Accessibility service for intercepting system shortcuts automatically.
Allows you to use Dex shortcuts while intercepting. Requires Accessibility service to work.
Toggle immersive mode in your device display
Fixes scancodes on some devices. Might cause problems with multiple layouts.
Pause key intercepting with Esc key
Capture external pointer devices when possible
Intercept all hardware pointer events. Pointer is back to Android after pressing Escape key.
Let X server handle hardware keyboard layout (with DE settings or setxkbmap).
Apply display scale factor to touchpad
Show software keyboard while hardware keyboard is connected.
Onscreen mouse buttons usable with touchpad
Stylus touch override, left, middle or right click (stylus only)
Store preferences for secondary displays separately
Open this screen on display you want to configure
Enable this option to send right or middle mouse buttons only when stylus touches the screen while the button is pressed.
Make your stylus work like a mouse. When activated, stylus will only move the cursor and send mouse clicks, ignoring pressure, angle, and tilt.
Requires display resolution mode to be exact or custom
Requires intercepting system shortcuts with Dex mode or with Accessibility service
Requires Touchscreen input mode to be Trackpad and Display resolution mode to be not native
Deactivate special keys on additional key bar after each keypress
Use long-tap to lock special keys
Press any button on your controller
(Spaces in paths must be wrapped in quotes)
Please select the container containing your save.
This shortcut is no longer available. Please delete or recreate it.
Soundfont you want to install is already exist.
This option will take effect at the next startup.
Tap with one finger and short tap with another finger
Unable to remove this content, because a container is currently using this Wine.
Unable to remove this wine version
Warning: The additional content contains untrusted files. Generally, the following files should not be modified. Please decide whether to proceed with the installation.
Warning: Mixing gamepad and mouse bindings on the same controller may cause unexpected behavior in games. It is recommended to use only gamepad bindings or only mouse/keyboard bindings.
